use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and dialogs across SaaS applications
Navigation and routing buttons in web interfaces
CTA buttons in marketing and landing page sections
Toolbars and action bars in data-driven applications
Icon buttons for compact UI controls in dashboards
ai_summary: A versatile shadcn/ui Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for type-safe variants, and CSS variables for theming. Features shadow styling, focus ring accessibility, and smooth hover transitions. Designed as a core atomic input component that integrates seamlessly into any shadcn/ui design system.
